caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a studio setting. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" with additional partially visible words below. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments and a white mannequin. Red and white logos reading "BOLLY TOT" appear in the lower corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing; he begins by looking slightly to the side, then moves his right arm and hand forward while continuing to talk. His facial expressions shift as he speaks, moving from a neutral gaze to an open-mouthed expression while maintaining his position at the microphone.
